title: helenium traxilum
intro: Helenium traxilum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and essential oils. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain in the body. Helenium traxilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in homeopathic remedies to promote healing and relief from various health conditions.
